name: Hot Off the Presses
description: Is the galaxy ready for a little Q tell-all? Is the Continuum empty? Are the Q responsible for the anomaly crisis? Or is there something more at play… something that could put the galaxy in further jeopardy?
rules:
-- There are two Phases to this Event! Each Phase is individually timed.
-- In this Hybrid Event, you will complete Faction Missions in one phase, and Specialist Missions in another phase.
-- Unique Federation, Ferengi Alliance, and Section 31 Faction Missions are available during the event. Open the Event to access them.
-- In a Specialist Event, you will select crew to engage in Specialist Missions.
-- Only a single crew with corresponding skills can be assigned to a Specialist Mission. After the mission is complete, that crew will be disabled from doing Specialist Missions for some period of time.
-- Specialist Missions take time to complete. The higher selected crew skills are the less time it will take them to complete a mission.
-- Only the highest skill of a crew is considered when calculating time to complete a mission.
-- Using crew with matching Specialist Mission bonus traits will significantly decrease time needed to complete a mission.
-- Each time a Specialist Mission is completed, some progress is also gained on the Main Mission. Completing the Main Mission rewards substantial amounts of Event Victory Points.
-- When you fail to gain bonus progress on the Main Mission using featured crew or crew with matching event bonus traits, the bonus progress chance goes up slightly the next time you use such crew in a mission. If you score the bonus progress, the bonus chance amount goes back to its initial value. 
-- Using Wingman Q, any version of Miss Q, Quinn, Odo, Exoarchaeologists, or Q Continuum crew will provide a bonus to Supply Missions and Specialist Missions.
-- Every Faction or Specialist Mission you complete earns you Event Victory Points. Collect Event Victory Points to unlock Threshold Rewards!
-- Community Rewards are also available during Phase 2 only. Collect Event Victory Points to unlock these rewards before the phase change!
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Crew Bonus: Wingman Q, Miss Q, Quinn, Odo, Exoarchaeologists, Q Continuum
rewards_teaser: Reach Rank 1 by gaining Victory Points from Event Missions!

featured_crew.name: Garak
featured_crew.flavor: Garak was found to be one of the prisoners held in the past on Terok Nor, where they were considered doomed Bajorans.

featured_crew.name: Quinn
featured_crew.flavor: Seeking support for his views on immortality, Quinn shows Janeway his article, which has caused quite a stir in the Continuum.

rewards.name: Chronitons
rewards.flavor: Chronitons allow your crew to take action in these chaotic times. Use Chronitons to replay parts of past missions via the Timeline.

rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Garak
rewards.flavor: Garak was found to be one of the prisoners held in the past on Terok Nor, where they were considered doomed Bajorans.

rewards.name: Rarity
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

missions.title: The Old
missions.description: Construct a history on the Q.

missions.title: Timeline
missions.description: Compile a timeline of the anomaly crisis.

missions.title: My Corner of the Continuum
missions.description: Find out the sentiments of whatever Q you can.

missions.title: Survey
missions.description: Collect sentiments from throughout the galaxy.

main_mission.title: The Real Scoop
main_mission.description: Get the dirt on the Q, their past, present, and future.

rewards.name: Quinn
rewards.flavor: Seeking support for his views on immortality, Quinn shows Janeway his article, which has caused quite a stir in the Continuum.

rewards.name: 10x Portal
rewards.flavor: 10 valuable items. Go to Time Portal to collect!

screens.text: "It is only right that these mortals would question us. They can't grasp what our existence is like. And with Q always around when trouble begins, what else are they to think?"

"Perhaps their attempts at 'thinking' are the problem. Their perceptions are so painfully linear. If they can't even conceive of what it is to exist so infinitely, they should stay out of the Continuum and stop accusing us."

"Investigating is how we learn, how we satisfy our curiosity. I don't get all this nonsense about being immortal or the 'Continuum', but I know a good story when I see one. You can't blame us for our curiosity."
"More needless back and forth. I tire of these games, don't you, Captain? Well, we're an open book. Probe away if that's what it takes to satisfy your curiosity."
"It is only right that these mortals would question us. They can't grasp what our existence is like. And with Q always around when trouble begins, what else are they to think?"

"Perhaps their attempts at 'thinking' are the problem. Their perceptions are so painfully linear. If they can't even conceive of what it is to exist so infinitely, they should stay out of the Continuum and stop accusing us."

"Investigating is how we learn, how we satisfy our curiosity. I don't get all this nonsense about being immortal or the 'Continuum', but I know a good story when I see one. You can't blame us for our curiosity."
"More needless back and forth. I tire of these games, don't you, Captain? Well, we're an open book. Probe away if that's what it takes to satisfy your curiosity."
"As you can see, Captain, straight answers are not the strong suit of the Q. Perhaps not speaking at all is a positive for the Continuum after all."
"Oh come off it, you old grouch, you've just forgotten how to have fun, like the rest of 'em. Maybe you should leave too. Go and find the others then?"

"You honestly think we know? They left without a trace once they realized they could. As if I have the time and interest to chase them across every little rift and dimension. The way I see it, you should be more occupied with thanking us for staying!"

To be completely honest, Captain, it's because I simply lack the drive to go anywhere else. All that time hating being stuck and yet, here I am. But I suspect this is a good thing for you. We don't know what would happen if every Q disappeared."
"Again and again, all you humans want is someone to blame, a place to point the finger. A metaphysical mystery blossoms before you and all you want to know is if I'm the bad guy or not."

"I don't get all this 'Continuum' hoopla, but I'm always open to a good story. The public seems rather invested and their sentiment on these beings seems to be changing rapidly. What can you get me on these 'Q', Captain?"
